commits.message: fix: rename all start buttons to "Start Convo"
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat: add location+ethnicity variables to Vapi squad prompts
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat: rename opener scenarios to ethnicity+location format, add location column
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat: add generate-character skill for scenario image creation
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: Rename all start buttons to "Start Convo"
panels.scene: A town square. Every single button, banner, sign, even a baby's bib, has been painstakingly changed to read 'Start Convo'. Villagers are weeping and pointing at the buttons with reverence.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He unified the call to action! Clarity has come to our village!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was a find and replace across the codebase.

panels.title: Add location+ethnicity variables to Vapi squad prompts
panels.scene: The Knight stands before a giant bubbling cauldron labeled 'Vapi Prompts'. He adds two small vials labeled 'Location' and 'Ethnicity'. The cauldron glows intensely. Villagers gasp.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He has unlocked the secrets of... personalization!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just adding two variables to the string template.

panels.title: Rename opener scenarios to ethnicity+location format, add location column
panels.scene: The village scribe frantically scratches out old names on giant scrolls labeled 'Opener Scenarios'. Next to him, the Knight adds a new column to a giant spreadsheet carved into stone. Tears stream down the scribe's face.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The old names are gone! The location column... it's beautiful!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's just a database schema change.

panels.title: 4 commits. Buttons renamed. Variables added. Columns added. Characters generated.
panels.scene: The Knight, slumped against a stone wall, looks utterly drained. In the background, villagers are building a giant statue of a pixelated knight made of stone. Someone is already praying at its feet.
